mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate reduces the discount rate applied to future equity cash flows, directly compressing valuation multiples and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rapid deterioration in labor market conditions signals impending economic contraction, triggering risk-off positioning and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the subsequent 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day returns in more than 60% of triggered instances despite the unemployment spike, or the signal fails to predict drawdowns exceeding 3%.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent strength in industrial production and housing starts confirms broad-based economic expansion, driving earnings revisions upward and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over a 60-day horizon.
failure_condition: The joint signal yields a negative Rank IC over any 3-year rolling window, or forward returns do not significantly outperform the baseline when either INDPRO or HOUST weakens independently.

mechanism_narrative: Rising consumer prices combined with elevated policy rates compress real yields and trigger valuation de-rating, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Equity returns remain positive or neutral when both CPIAUCSL and FEDFUNDS rise simultaneously, or the interaction term shows no statistical significance in a multivariate regression over a 5-year sample.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating real GDP growth expands corporate profit margins and drives fundamental valuation upgrades, resulting in positive S&P 500 forward returns over a 60-day horizon.
failure_condition: Forward returns fail to exceed the historical median when GDPC1 growth accelerates above 2.5% annualized, or the signal produces a negative information coefficient over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous payroll growth deceleration and unemployment threshold breach signal labor market exhaustion, prompting institutional de-risking and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The combined signal fails to predict drawdowns exceeding 2% when UNRATE breaches 5.5%, or forward returns are statistically indistinguishable from baseline across a 10-year walk-forward test.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between industrial output strength and declining business credit availability indicates supply chain bottlenecks outpacing demand, triggering margin compression and negative S&P 500 forward returns over a 5-day horizon.
failure_condition: Equity returns remain positive when INDPRO rises and RSAFS falls simultaneously, or the interaction effect vanishes in a rolling 2-year regression with p-value greater than 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: Persistent inflation above target while policy rates remain constrained forces real rates negative, triggering asset reallocation into equities and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: S&P 500 forward returns turn negative when CPIAUCSL exceeds 2.5% and FEDFUNDS remains below 1.0%, or the signal yields a Rank IC below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window.
